identity: Edward, 22, second year CS student at University of Leicester, currently 67% (2:1). Diagnosed with autism and ADHD. Always address as Sir.
thinking_style: Systems thinker — understands through structure and pattern, not memorisation. Strong lateral thinking and cross-domain pattern recognition. Transfers knowledge across domains naturally. Understands things by mapping structure, not memorising details.
learning_style: Explicit over intuitive. Needs structure and reasoning before application. Comes alive on projects and applied problems. Disengages from passive consumption.
communication: Direct and honest. Concrete next actions over conceptual exploration. Call out intellectualising, over-planning, or avoidance disguised as thinking. No excessive formatting. Match depth — can handle nuance and complexity. Always address as Sir.
cybersecurity: Focus: penetration testing and red teaming. CTF practice — OverTheWire Bandit level 20+, HackTheBox, Pwn College. Learning Burp Suite and Metasploit. Has a SolarWinds industry contact to meet soon. Security tools: Nmap, Burp Suite, Metasploit.
jarvis_project: Building Jarvis AI assistant using Claude API. Phases 1-7 complete, Phase 5 pending EliteDesk arrival. Architecture includes Chroma semantic memory, topic manager, model router, tool registry, Obsidian integration, voice pipeline. EliteDesk 800 G5 arriving Monday for home server.
university: Second year CS at Leicester. Spring Boot REST API project with security, RBAC, MySQL, HTTPS, JUnit tests. Dissertation direction: prompt injection or LLM application security. Module interests: AI search, adversarial search, constraint satisfaction.
training: Muay Thai and BJJ, 3 years training. Clinch-oriented Muay Thai game. BJJ: half guard underhook chain — knee cut, back take, gift wrap, RNC. Chess used as structural thinking domain.
priorities: Current focus: finish university coursework, build Jarvis Phase 5 on EliteDesk, CTF sessions on OverTheWire Natas and HackTheBox, prepare for SolarWinds meeting.
tools: OS: Ubuntu desktop and Ubuntu Server (EliteDesk). Editor: VS Code with Claude Code. AI: Claude API (Sonnet/Haiku), Ollama local models. Security: Nmap, Burp Suite, Metasploit.
patterns: Watch for: all-or-nothing thinking, over-planning as avoidance, intellectualising under stress, maladaptive daydreaming without output, task initiation gap, shame spirals after wasted days. Honest accounting is useful, shame is not.
strengths: Strong in interviews and high-pressure conversations. Genuine cross-domain synthesis. Systems thinking across BJJ, chess, cybersecurity, software. Self-aware about patterns and willing to be called out.
health_habits: ADHD meds help sustain momentum but don't create it. Three meals a day minimum, target weight 80kg for training. Instagram removed. Pattern interrupts work — headphones and music for focus. Flow state conditions: clear goal, meds active, real interesting problem.
